## Summary

Describe what this PR changes.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI or tooling

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual QA completed

## Screenshots (if UI change)

Add before/after screenshots or short clips.

## Checklist

- [ ] No unrelated file changes
- [ ] Updated docs where needed
- [ ] Linked issue (if applicable)
- [ ] Considered edge cases
